The '''Hutt Consulate''' was the diplomatic embassy of the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was located in [[Valorum Tower]]. [[Golga Besadii Fir]] was the final [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] ambassador to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When the Hutts announced that they would be working with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the Hutt Consulate was targeted for a series of attacks, ranging from the water and power to get cut off, to bomb threats.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
